payload.text:
Aquí tienes el Documento de Especificación Técnica y Funcional (PRD) completo.

Este documento está estructurado y redactado específicamente para ser copiado y pegado como "Prompt Context" (Contexto de Instrucción) en Google AI Studio o cualquier herramienta de desarrollo asistido por IA. Contiene toda la lógica, reglas y estructuras de datos que definimos.

📁 ESPECIFICACIÓN DE PROYECTO: PLATAFORMA DE ENTRENAMIENTO DIGITAL FARMATODO (POC)
1. VISIÓN GENERAL

Desarrollo de un Prototipo Funcional (POC) para digitalizar la gestión de planes de entrenamiento ("La Carpeta Azul") de Farmatodo Venezuela. El sistema gestiona la asignación automática de tareas, seguimiento de progreso y validación por supervisores, diferenciando lógica entre personal de Tienda (Operaciones) y Administrativos (Oficina).

2. ARQUITECTURA DE DATOS (JSON SCHEMA)

Para la construcción de la base de datos simulada, utilizar estas estructuras:

A. Colección: Usuarios
code
JSON
download
content_copy
expand_less
{
  "id": "user_001",
  "nombre": "María Pérez",
  "cargo": "Asistente Piso de Ventas - APV",
  "rol_sistema": "COLABORADOR", // Opciones: COLABORADOR, SUPERVISOR_TIENDA, SUPERVISOR_OFICINA, ADMIN
  "area": "Operaciones", // Opciones: Operaciones, Oficina
  "fecha_ingreso": "2025-12-01",
  "id_supervisor": "user_099"
}
B. Colección: Biblioteca_Recursos (Master Index)
code
JSON
download
content_copy
expand_less
{
  "codigo": "PAP-VPO-200", // Clave única
  "nombre": "Apertura de Tienda",
  "tipo": "PAP", // Opciones: PAP (PDF), VIDEO (MP4/Link), CURSO (SCORM/Ext)
  "url": "https://sharepoint.../vpo200.pdf",
  "estado": "ACTIVO"
}
C. Colección: Planes_Maestros (Plantillas)

Generados por el Admin desde la ingesta de archivos.

code
JSON
download
content_copy
expand_less
{
  "id_plan": "PLAN-APV-VE",
  "cargo_target": "Asistente Piso de Ventas - APV",
  "duracion_dias": 30,
  "modulos": [
    {
      "titulo": "Caja Registradora",
      "tipo_modulo": "ESTANDAR", // Opciones: ESTANDAR (No editable), PERSONALIZADO (Solo Oficina)
      "tareas": [
        {
          "descripcion": "Apertura de Tienda",
          "recurso_ref": "PAP-VPO-200", // Link dinámico a Biblioteca
          "obligatorio": true
        },
        {
          "descripcion": "Curso Xstore Básico",
          "recurso_ref": "CURSO-ACADEMIA-01",
          "tipo_visual": "VIDEO" // Muestra icono Play
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
D. Colección: Progreso_Usuario (Transaccional)
code
JSON
download
content_copy
expand_less
{
  "id_usuario": "user_001",
  "id_plan": "PLAN-APV-VE",
  "fecha_inicio": "2025-12-01",
  "estado_general": "EN_PROCESO", // Opciones: EN_PROCESO, PENDIENTE, FORMADO
  "progreso_porcentaje": 15,
  "checks_completados": ["PAP-VPO-200"], // Array de IDs de tareas
  "evaluaciones": [
    { "competencia": "Sentido de Urgencia", "resultado": "LOGRADO", "feedback": "Muy bien" }
  ]
}
3. REGLAS DE NEGOCIO (LOGIC LAYER)

Instrucciones estrictas para el comportamiento del sistema:

R1. Matriz de Permisos (Edición)

Admin Capacitación: Puede Crear, Editar, Eliminar Planes y Recursos. Carga masiva habilitada.

Supervisor Tienda (Gerente): Acceso SOLO LECTURA al contenido del plan. Acceso ESCRITURA solo para marcar Checkbox de validación y evaluaciones. No puede agregar tareas.

Supervisor Oficina: Puede agregar tareas nuevas (Custom Tasks) al final de los módulos. No puede borrar tareas base del plan maestro.

R2. Motor de Ingesta Inteligente (Corrección de Errores)

Al importar archivos Excel/PDF, el sistema debe aplicar:

Regla "OPAR-VPO": Si encuentra el string PAP-OPAR-[numero], convertir automáticamente a PAP-VPO-[numero] y buscar en la biblioteca.

Regla "Lazy Linking": Si un recurso no tiene URL en la biblioteca, el plan se crea igual, pero el botón en el frontend muestra "Pendiente de Carga" (Deshabilitado). Al cargar la URL en la biblioteca, se activa en todos los planes.

R3. Semáforo de Estado (Cálculo Diario)

Fecha Fin Estimada = Fecha Inicio + duracion_dias del plan.

🔴 ROJO (Atrasado): Si (Fecha Actual > Fecha Fin) Y (Progreso < 100%). Envía alerta.

🟡 AMARILLO (Riesgo): Si el usuario lleva > 3 días sin actividad registrada.

🟢 VERDE (Al día): Flujo normal.

R4. Iconografía Dinámica

Si el recurso es tipo "PAP" o "PDF" → Mostrar icono 📄 (Documento).

Si el recurso es tipo "CURSO", "VIDEO", "ACADEMIA" → Mostrar icono ▶️ (Play).

Si es "ENCUESTA" o "FORM" → Mostrar icono 🔗 (Enlace).

4. ESPECIFICACIÓN DE INTERFAZ (UI/UX)
Pantalla 1: Vista Colaborador (El Plan)

Header: Datos del colaborador + Barra de Progreso General.

Body: Acordeón por Módulos.

Fila de Tarea:

Columna 1: Checkbox (Deshabilitado para el usuario si requiere validación de supervisor, Habilitado si es auto-check).

Columna 2: Nombre Tarea.

Columna 3: Icono Tipo (📄/▶️).

Columna 4: Botón de Acción ("Ver", "Reproducir"). Abre Modal.

Acción de Botón: El botón solo funciona si el recurso tiene link activo.

Pantalla 2: Vista Admin (Carga Masiva)

Área de "Drag & Drop" para archivos .xlsx / .pdf.

Tabla de "Preview" antes de guardar: Muestra las tareas detectadas y los códigos de PAP extraídos.

Log de Errores: "Código PAP-OPAR-200 corregido a PAP-VPO-200".

Pantalla 3: Evaluación de Competencias (Supervisor)

Tabla específica para evaluar conductas (Pág 2 del PDF).

No usa Checkbox simple. Usa Radio Buttons: ( ) Logrado | ( ) A Mejorar.

Campo de texto obligatorio si marca "A Mejorar".

5. INSTRUCCIONES PARA GOOGLE AI STUDIO (PROMPTS SUGERIDOS)

Copia estos bloques en el chat de la IA para generar el código:

Prompt 1: Generación de Base de Datos y Tipos

"Actúa como un Arquitecto de Software Senior. Genera las interfaces de TypeScript y un set de datos 'mock' (ficticios) en JSON basados en la 'Arquitectura de Datos' definida arriba. Incluye datos reales del Plan APV Venezuela y los PAPs de Operaciones proporcionados."

Prompt 2: Lógica de Ingesta

"Escribe una función en JavaScript/Python que simule la ingesta de un plan. La función debe recibir un objeto JSON crudo (como si viniera de un Excel), iterar sobre las tareas, y aplicar la 'Regla de Negocio R2' (Corrección OPAR a VPO). También debe cruzar los códigos con la 'Biblioteca_Recursos' para asignar las URLs si existen."

Prompt 3: Componente Frontend (React/Vue)

"Crea un componente de React para la 'Vista Colaborador'. Debe recibir el objeto 'Plan' y renderizar la lista de tareas. Implementa la lógica visual para mostrar el icono 📄 o ▶️ según el tipo de recurso. El botón de acción debe abrir un modal. Si el estado es 'PENDIENTE', el botón debe estar gris."

6. DATOS DE PRUEBA (DATASET INICIAL)

Usar estos datos para poblar el POC:

A. Módulo Caja (Extracto Corregido):

Tarea: Apertura de Tienda | Recurso: PAP-VPO-200 | Tipo: PAP

Tarea: Curso Xstore Básico | Recurso: ACADEMIA-XS-01 | Tipo: VIDEO

Tarea: Manejo de Devoluciones | Recurso: PAP-VPO-239 | Tipo: PAP

B. Estado del Plan:

Duración: 30 Días.

Cargo: APV.

Reglas: Todas las tareas de Caja son obligatorias.

**Conceptualizing the Platform**

I'm currently focused on the user roles and how they'll interact with the "Carpeta Azul" content.  I'm exploring how to translate the physical folder's structure and training materials into a digital format, ensuring COLABORADORES and SUPERVISORES have distinct, appropriate access. The goal is to retain the essence of the original training while leveraging digital advantages.


**Designing the Interface**

I've been mapping out the screen structure, distinguishing views for Employees, Admins, and Supervisors. My focus is on ensuring a clear and efficient user experience, particularly concerning competency evaluations and bulk upload functionalities. I'm prioritizing the layout and data flow for the "Traffic Light" status and plan on simulating the "Smart Ingest" logic using Gemini API to analyze files during uploads. The technical stack is now pretty clear, with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and other libraries selected. I am also planning the file structure for the project.


**Establishing the Project Structure**

I'm solidifying the project's file and component organization. I've defined initial datasets and crucial logic within `logic.ts`. UI component development is underway, focusing on the planned views: Collaborator, Admin, and Supervisor.  I'm integrating Gemini via `geminiService.ts` for "Smart Ingest," specifically targeting rule implementation, particularly  `PAP-OPAR-[num]` to `PAP-VPO-[num]`. I've outlined the Traffic Light and permission matrix logic in detail to guide implementation.

entries.description: Project metadata and permissions.
TypeScript definitions based on the PRD architecture.
Initial mock dataset for the POC.
Business rules logic implementation.
Service to handle smart ingestion logic using Gemini API.
Helper for dynamic icons based on resource type.
Component for the employee training plan view.
Bulk upload and smart ingestion dashboard for admins.
Competency evaluation screen for store/office supervisors.
Main application logic, routing, and role switching.
React entry point.
HTML entry point with Tailwind script.

payload.text:
**Initiating Content Analysis**

I'm currently focused on extracting key information from the "PLAN DE ENTRENAMIENTO" document. My goal is to determine the optimal approach for integrating this content into the Farmatodo digital platform. I'm exploring different methods, including OCR and manual review, to ensure data accuracy and user-friendliness. The "PAP - Operaciones" index provides a critical framework for this process, which I am actively considering.


**Developing Integration Strategies**

I've been mapping the document content into actionable modules for the digital platform. This involves structuring tasks and differentiating links to "PAP" documents and Academy content within the user interface. My priority is enriching the `mockResources` data with accurate URLs for both "PAP" and "Cursos," and refining the `mockPlans` based on screenshots of the plan structure. The goal is to accurately represent the onboarding plan within the platform.


**Defining Module Content**

I'm now deep-diving into the "PLAN DE ENTRENAMIENTO" to flesh out each module's core content. I'm focusing on "Bienvenida" and "Servicio al Cliente," breaking down each section into its granular components, like "Imagen corporativa" and "100% cajas operativas." I'm also cross-referencing this with the PAP index, mapping specific PAPs like PAP-VPO-200 to relevant modules for a more comprehensive training framework.


**Organizing Content & Links**

I've been working on integrating new data. Specifically, I'm mapping PAP documents, like PAP-VPO-503,  to relevant sections. I'm also now focusing on refining the platform UI, including updating `mockResources` and `mockPlans`, and making the distinction between PAP and Academy links clearer in the `CollaboratorView`. I'm integrating information from a CSV file detailing specific courses.


**Restructuring Data Elements**

I'm currently focused on refactoring the `mockData.ts` file, a substantial undertaking. I'm prioritizing accurate resource definition based on both the PAP index and the CSV file containing specific course details. My primary objective is to rebuild the `MasterPlan` precisely mirroring the PDF structure, ensuring all resources and their associated links are correctly represented, resolving the two column display issue with the `CollaboratorView.tsx` update, as planned.

diagnostics.message: Property 'map' does not exist on type 'unknown'.

payload.text:
**Analyzing TypeScript Error**

I'm currently investigating a TypeScript error in `components/SupervisorView.tsx` at line 158. The error message indicates that the `map` property is not recognized on a variable of type `unknown`. This suggests the variable likely holds an array or array-like structure. I need to determine the actual type of the variable to resolve this type mismatch and enable the use of the `map` function.


**Resolving Type Conflict**

I've been going over the file `components/SupervisorView.tsx` to get to the bottom of this TypeScript error.  I initially thought the error was in `AdminView.tsx`, but after double-checking, it's definitely in `SupervisorView.tsx`. The error is on line 158 which is a calculation for `progressPct`. The type issue appears to be with `plan.modulos`, not the `preview.modulos` I was initially confused by, preventing the `map` property to be used.


**Identifying Potential Source**

I'm now focusing on `components/SupervisorView.tsx` again. The error's on line 158, which is beyond the file's scope as it ends around line 2. This suggests a potential issue in the build process or a mismatch between the reported line number and the actual code location. I'll double-check file indexing and see if there are any other files that could be causing this problem. I need to figure out where line 158 is, or if the compiler is giving me the wrong line.


**Confirming Type Inference**

I'm revisiting the `components/SupervisorView.tsx` file, where the "map" error occurs on line 158 with the line: `{Object.entries(evaluations).map(([category, items]) => (`. Upon inspection, I noticed that `evaluations` is defined as `Record<string, Evaluation[]>`, which means `Object.entries(evaluations)` should return an array of `[string, Evaluation[]]`. Therefore, the `items` in the current context should also be `Evaluation[]`, allowing the `map` function. The error message on line 158 is still being reported, and that line is beyond the scope of this file. This suggests that there is a build artifact, or cache issue, that may be causing the problem.


**Debugging File References**

The line numbers were throwing me off, so I went back to basics and reviewed the file structure. I realized the error in `SupervisorView.tsx` isn't with `map` on `items` as I initially thought; it's with an underlying issue. The true error, at line 158 is likely a build issue, related to a type being mis-inferred. I'm pivoting to examine `services/geminiService.ts` to see if there's a type mismatch related to the GoogleGenAI SDK's `GenerateContentResponse`. My goal is to ensure the correct types are being used throughout the code.


**Clarifying Type Definition**

I'm now revisiting `services/geminiService.ts` and the `generateContent` function, and am realizing my earlier assumption about the `SupervisorView.tsx` error was a red herring. It appears that the issue is not related to the `GenerateContentResponse` return type, but the usage of `response.text`. I'm going to remove the `|| ''` after `process.env.API_KEY` to streamline the code as per the guidelines. I need to make sure `response.text` is directly accessible and is handled correctly.


**Verifying Type Inference**

I'm now revisiting `components/SupervisorView.tsx`. The error is still on the line 158 which references `items.map`. The type of `evaluations` is `Record<string, Evaluation[]>`, making `items` an `Evaluation[]`. This inference *should* be correct. I need to make sure the environment is configured to the correct TypeScript version to verify the type inferences. I also will explicitly define the types. Additionally, I need to remove the `|| ''` from `services/geminiService.ts` according to the guidelines.


**Examining Code Structure**

payload.text: ahora haz lo mismo para colaborador cuyo  plan de entrenamiento de Asistente de piso de venta senior
files: {"name":"PDE _ Operaciones Venezuela - Actualizado 07.2025 - PDE _ APV Sr (Externo).pdf","type":"application/pdf","size":247751,"lastModified":1766880023852,"data":""}

payload.text:
**Revising CollaboratorView**

I'm currently working on updating the `CollaboratorView` to include the training plan for the "Asistente de Piso de Ventas Senior" role. I've extracted the core data from the provided materials and am now integrating it into the view, focusing on the 90-day duration. The goal is to accurately represent this new plan within the interface.


**Detailing Training Modules**

Now I'm diving deeper into the training modules for "Asistente de Piso de Ventas Senior." I've outlined the key topics, from onboarding with "Plan de Inducción" and "Bienvenida" to operational areas like "Gestión Inicial de la Tienda" and customer service protocols. I'm focusing on dissecting each module, including specifics on planograms, digital signage, pharmacy services, and more, for thoroughness.


**Analyzing Operational Tasks**

I'm now meticulously dissecting the operational tasks outlined for the senior sales assistant, including self-checkout procedures and delivery protocols. I'm focusing on the intricacies of the cash register, from Xstore functions to cash handling. Furthermore, I'm examining inventory control, CENDIS processes, vendor interactions, and loss prevention measures, aiming for a detailed understanding of all responsibilities.


**Enumerating New Responsibilities**

I've been analyzing the expanded responsibilities of the Senior Sales Assistant, now incorporating detailed procedures for reconciliation, closing processes, and dollar fund management (PAP-VPO-735). I'm also mapping out the VAT refund protocols, daily reporting, and the operation of external payment points like Ubiipago. Additionally, I'm working through petty cash management, Panamericano cash control, and Transbanca transactions, along with digitizing processes and contingencies related to sales. I've also incorporated the shift handover procedures, and I'm updating `mockData.ts` to reflect the changes.


**Updating Task Mapping**

I'm now focusing on mapping the extensive list of PAP-VPO codes to the appropriate training modules. I'm ensuring the `CollaboratorView` adapts to the increased detail and confirms to the rule of R2, which means that PAP-OPAR-XXX will need to be written as PAP-VPO-XXX. The goal is to accurately represent the complex workflows and responsibilities, keeping in mind the 90-day training duration and specific modules such as "Plan de Inducción" and "Bienvenida." I am also making sure to take the correct codes to keep the program running smoothly.


**Incorporating Training Resources**

I'm now integrating the additional modules from the training plan, including "Etiquetado," "Farmacia y Servicios Farmacéuticos," "Autopago y domicilios," "Caja," "CENDIS y Proveedores," "Inventario," "Merma (Ajustes autorizados)," "Controles Administrativos," "Intranet & G Suite," "SHA," "Mantenimiento Técnico," "Aspectos legales," "Gestión de RRHH," and "Compensación variable." The immediate focus is updating `mockData.ts` to reflect these new training resources for a more complete and accurate training plan. I'm verifying and extracting relevant data from each module.


**Matching Competencies to View**

I'm now integrating the competency model from the PDF into `SupervisorView`. I'm updating `mockData.ts` to reflect the full APV Senior training plan and then aligning the hardcoded categories in `SupervisorView` to match the "Modelo de Competencias" groupings like "Excelencia" and "Generando Resultados." The goal is to accurately reflect the training structure and the evaluation criteria as outlined in the provided documents, focusing on a clear presentation for supervisors.


**Matching Plans to Competencies**

I'm now implementing the 90-day plan into `mockData.ts` using the detailed competency model. Then, I'll update `SupervisorView.tsx` so the categories align with the "Modelo de Competencias" presented in the PDF. The goal is to ensure the supervisor view accurately reflects the training structure and evaluation criteria, as defined for the "Asistente de Piso de Ventas Senior" role, specifically based on pages 5 and 6 of the provided document.

He actualizado la aplicación para reflejar fielmente el nuevo **Plan de Entrenamiento para APV Senior (Externo)** con una duración de **90 días**, tal como se detalla en el documento de 6 páginas proporcionado.

### Especificaciones de la actualización:

1.  **Ingesta de Datos (mockData):**
    *   Se han registrado más de **40 nuevos recursos (PAPs)** extraídos directamente del OCR (desde `PAP-VPO-106` hasta `PAP-VPO-1000`).
    *   El plan maestro ahora cuenta con **20 módulos detallados**, cubriendo desde la "Gestión Inicial de la Tienda" hasta "Mantenimiento Técnico" y "Controles Administrativos".
    *   Se actualizó la duración del cargo APV Senior a **90 días**.

2.  **Vista del Supervisor (Evaluación de Competencias):**
    *   Se rediseñó el desglose de competencias siguiendo el modelo visual de la página 5 del PDF.
    *   Las categorías ahora son: **Impulsando a Farmatodo**, **Generando Resultados**, **Alcanzando Seguimiento y Control**, **La Excelencia** (Sentido de urgencia, Energía, Madurez) y **Valores**.

3.  **Vista del Colaborador:**
    *   Ahora visualiza el plan extendido con todos los nuevos módulos y recursos vinculados.

entries.description: Actualización completa del plan de entrenamiento a APV Senior (90 días) y carga masiva de recursos PAP extraídos del PDF.
Actualización del modelo de competencias para APV Senior reflejando las categorías estratégicas de Farmatodo (La Excelencia, Generando Resultados, etc.)

payload.text:
perfecto, ahora haz que el perfil del admintrador pueda ver 4 modulos> 

Modulo colabodores> donde puede ver una tabla ordenada por pais que ttiene la informcion de cada colaborador, es decir, cedula, nombre, apellido, cargo, fecha de ingreso, duracion del plan, tienda avance en el plan, estado (en proceso proque esta dentro del plazo, pendiente porqque el plazo vencido o formado porque ya lo culmino, y otro proceso es falta aprobacion, es que ya lo culmino pero aun no se lo han aprobado), 
Modulo indicadores necesito que como administrador podemos ver daasboard de indicadores el inidcador es cantidad de personas con estatus formado dividido entre cantidad de personas formadas+personas pendientes (los en proceso se excluyen del inidcador). ese inidcador tiene que tener varios grafico, por pais, por area (area 1 o area 2) y por tienda. 
modulo de gestion de planes, aca el admin debe poder crear nuevos planes, ajsutar planes existentes como a;adirles modulos, tareas o cursos y pap a los planes.

**Considering User Interface Expansion**

I'm currently fleshing out the `AdminView` enhancement. My focus now is designing the "Modulo Colaboradores." This section will be a sortable table. Key data points will be displayed, like CI, name, surname, position, entry date, plan duration, store, progress, and status. I'm prioritizing clarity and efficiency in presenting this collaborator data.


**Designing Further Functionality**

I've moved on to the remaining modules. The *Modulo Indicadores* will be a KPI dashboard with charts by Country, Area, and Store, and I'm adding `PENDIENTE_APROBACION` to `PlanState`. I'm also preparing to expand the `mockUsers` data. For navigation, I'll use a sub-navigation bar with tabs for *Colaboradores*, *Indicadores*, *Gestión de Planes*, and *Ingesta Inteligente*. Filters and sorting will be incorporated, with an initial sort by Country.


**Integrating Visualizations and Status**

I'm now integrating KPI cards and mock charts, aiming for a CSS/SVG solution to avoid external library dependencies. I'm also preparing the plan list and an editing form. The Gemini ingestion logic remains untouched. I'm updating the `types.ts` and `mockData.ts` accordingly, including `pais`, `apellido`, and `tienda`. The `AdminView.tsx` rewrite is underway to encompass all modules, with a dedicated `Charts.tsx` component. Finally, I'm working on the KPI calculation and status mapping logic.


**Developing the Interface Style**

I'm now fully immersed in the design aspect. I've adopted a blue corporate color scheme with clean, visually appealing cards. Using Tailwind for layout has streamlined the process. I'm focusing on incorporating real-world data, starting with Venezuela and Colombia as initial country options, and stores named Tienda 001, Tienda 002, and so on. Now, I'm ready to begin implementation of the codebase.

He actualizado el **Perfil de Administrador** para convertirlo en un centro de mando robusto con los 4 módulos solicitados. He mejorado el modelo de datos para incluir información geográfica (país, tienda) y estados extendidos de aprobación.

### Especificaciones de la actualización:

1.  **Módulo Colaboradores:** Tabla interactiva con filtros por país, que muestra el detalle completo: Cédula, Nombre, Cargo, Tienda, Avance y un **Semáforo de Estado** inteligente (En Proceso, Pendiente, Formado, Falta Aprobación).
2.  **Módulo Indicadores:** Dashboard analítico que calcula el KPI real solicitado: `Formados / (Formados + Pendientes)`. Incluye visualizaciones de barras comparativas por País, Área y Tienda.
3.  **Módulo Gestión de Planes:** Interfaz para editar el contenido técnico de los planes (añadir módulos, tareas o PAPs) y crear nuevos cargos.
4.  **Módulo Ingesta Inteligente (Gemini AI):** Se mantiene el motor de IA para procesar documentos técnicos rápidamente.

It seems the initial mock data had more modules. Further investigation is needed to pinpoint the module removal and determine its cause.


**Adding Module Details**

I'm now enriching the module content in `mockData.ts` to better match the user's requirements. This involves populating a comprehensive set of modules for "PLAN-APV-SR-2025," including Inducción, Bienvenida, Servicio al Cliente, and others, with detailed sub-tasks like "Inicio 2.0" and "Competencias."  My focus is on accurately representing the diverse tasks within each module, ensuring all related resources are correctly referenced in `mockResources`.


**Developing New Modules**

I'm now building out the new modules. I've broken down the *Farmacia*, *Autopago*, *Caja*, *CENDIS*, *Inventario*, *Merma*, and *Administrativo* modules into specific task sets, and these modules need to be added to `mockData.ts` and `mockResources` now.  Finally, I'm working on updating `mockUserProgress` to demonstrate active completion of a selection of these modules.

He restaurado la configuración completa del Plan de Entrenamiento Maestro en `mockData.ts`. El problema era que el objeto `mockPlans` se había simplificado accidentalmente a un solo módulo, lo que provocaba que el colaborador no viera el resto de las secciones (Servicio al Cliente, Farmacia, Inventario, etc.).

He vuelto a incluir los 14 módulos detallados con sus respectivas tareas y referencias a recursos (PAPs y Academia).

entries.description: Restauración de la biblioteca completa de módulos y recursos para el Plan APV Senior en mockData.ts.
